name: Curried Chicken and Vegetable Salad Mintz
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound green beans, trimmed and halved crosswise
2 teaspoons curry powder, or to taste
2 plum tomatoes, each cut into 6 wedges
1 whole boneless skinless chicken breast, cooked and cut into 1/2-inch cubes
3 ounces cooked smoked pork loin, or ham cut into matchsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, bring 3 quarts salted water to a boil for vegetables.
2. Cut potatoes into 1/4-inch-thick slices and boil until just tender, about 3 minutes. Transfer potatoes with a small strainer or slotted spoon to a bowl of ice and cold water to stop cooking. Cool potatoes and transfer with the strainer or slotted spoon to a large serving bowl.
3. Boil and cool carrots and green beans separately in the same manner and add to potatoes.
4. In a large skillet, cook onion and curry powder in oil over moderately high heat, stirring, until onion is softened. Add tomatoes and cook mixture, stirring occasionally, 1 minute.
5. Cool mixture.
6. In a small bowl whisk together mayonnaise and yogurt and stir into the cool vegetable mixture with chicken, pork or ham, and salt and pepper to taste. Salad may be made 4 hours ahead and chilled, covered.
7. Serves 4 to 6
